personality_one_liner: A premium, highly readable marketplace where content is the hero, elevated by cinematic navy and gold accents to project absolute trust and authority.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room. Padding around content blocks, safe-area strictly maintained. No half-width orphans on cards.

do_s: Use blur on bottom tab bar, floating bottom-sheet headers, and sticky headers above scrollable catalogs.
Apply frosted glass over the abstract navy/gold texture for premium 'Authorized' hero cards.
Pair glass with a translucent tinted base (>=70% surface opacity) to guarantee readability.
dont_s: Never blur body text regions, form fields, or primary buttons.
Never stack more than 2 glass surfaces (e.g., header and tab bar is max).

screens.name: Client Home (Discover)
screens.purpose: A premium catalog entry point allowing clients to discover top advisors by category with trust-building visual cues.

states.loading: Centered spinner over a subtle Navy background.
states.empty: Should not be empty, but search filters fallback to 'No advisors found' with a clear reset CTA.
states.error: Readable message: 'Unable to load advisors.' + Retry button.

screens.layout: Sticky glass header (Greeting + Wallet Balance). Below it: A full-bleed 'Authorized Dealer' hero card featuring abstract navy/gold textured imagery + gradient scrim + white text. Horizontal scroll of category chips (36pt height, brandTertiary filled) ensuring it does not crowd content. Vertical list of advisor cards below (each card takes full width minus padding).

screens.name: Advisor Catalog & Filters
screens.purpose: Deep browsing of advisors based on detailed filters (fee, rating, experience).

states.empty: Illustration of an empty desk + 'Adjust your filters to find advisors'.
states.error: Error loading catalog, pull to refresh.

screens.layout: Pinned glass filter row below header. Advisor cards layout: Avatar on left, Details on right. Prominent Gold badge for 'Authorized' status. Clear 'Book' button aligned right.

screens.name: Booking & Slot Picker
screens.purpose: Frictionless multi-step flow to pick time slots, mode, and execute payment.

states.loading: Spinner centered on the bottom sheet.
states.error: Slot unavailable message + select another time.

screens.layout: Bottom sheet pattern using @gorhom/bottom-sheet. Horizontal date strip (pill selection). Grid of time slots. Segmented control for Mode (Phone/Video/Chat/Physical). Sticky brandPrimary 'Proceed to Pay' CTA anchored at bottom above home indicator.

screens.name: Service Ticket Workspace
screens.purpose: A dedicated collaborative space where clients and advisors track work stages, confirm milestones, and release escrow funds.

states.empty: No active tickets illustration + 'Book an advisor to start'.

screens.layout: Stack Screen. Top: Sticky ticket summary (Status Pill, Title, Amount). Middle: Scrollable timeline of milestones with vertical line connecting them. Bottom: KeyboardAvoidingView wrapping the comment input and primary CTA ('Approve Stage').

screens.name: Advisor Dashboard
screens.purpose: Operational command center for advisors to track earnings, upcoming bookings, and respond to quotes.

states.empty: Welcome state with 'Complete profile to get bookings'.

screens.layout: Grid of KPI cards (2-column, utilizing flexWrap and space-between). List of actionable items (Pending Quotes, Active Tickets) below. Pinned 'Authorized Dealer' upgrade banner with brandSecondary background.

screens.name: Advisor Onboarding
screens.purpose: An 8-step funnel guiding advisors to set up their professional profile seamlessly.

states.error: Inline validation errors below inputs in error color.

screens.layout: Top SafeArea progress bar. Generous vertical spacing for inputs (labels above). Single column form. Sticky brandPrimary CTA at the bottom to ensure easy navigation to the next step.

hero_authorized_background.alt: Abstract navy and gold luxury texture

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply '1 iOS-Native Clean' rules: highly readable UI framing the content. Do not exceed 500 font-weight.
Utilize Navy (#0B1F3A) primarily for core CTAs and Inverse surface elements to retain a premium edge without feeling heavy.
Utilize Gold (#D4AF37) exclusively for premium markers ('Authorized Dealer' badges, 'Best Value' tags, upgrade accents). Do not use it for primary interactions.
Implement the gradient scrim pattern (transparent to 70% surfaceInverse) over the hero_authorized_background image to ensure text readability.
For the booking flow, rely heavily on @gorhom/bottom-sheet. Keep the screen context visible behind the frosted glass scrim.
Ensure the Client/Advisor role switch occurs elegantly at sign-in, maintaining consistent branding but separating their tab spaces.
In the Escrow Service Ticket flow, layout the milestone confirmations vertically like a timeline. Pin the CTA to the bottom to ensure easy access to action items.
Implement haptics on primary actions: booking confirmations, milestone approvals, and tab switching.
MANDATORY: Follow <Spacing_and_Layout> guidelines—buttons must be sticky above scrolling content with proper safe area padding.
